data.name: Abyssal Harvester
data.oracle_text: {T}: Exile target creature card from a graveyard that was put there this turn. Create a token that's a copy of it, except it's a Nightmare in addition to its other types. Then exile all other Nightmare tokens you control.
data.flavor_text:
"Till the soil, spare no soul. / Neath the darkness, nightmares grow."
—Children's nursery rhyme

data.name: Alesha, Who Laughs at Fate
data.oracle_text:
First strike
Whenever Alesha attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on it.
Raid — At the beginning of your end step, if you attacked this turn, return target creature card with mana value less than or equal to Alesha's power from your graveyard to the battlefield.

data.name: Angelic Destiny
data.oracle_text:
Enchant creature
Enchanted creature gets +4/+4, has flying and first strike, and is an Angel in addition to its other types.
When enchanted creature dies, return this card to its owner's hand.

data.name: Burnished Hart
data.oracle_text: {3}, Sacrifice this creature: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
data.flavor_text: Forged by divine hands to wander mortal realms.

data.name: Bushwhack
data.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
• Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control. (Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.)

data.name: Campus Guide
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, then shuffle and put that card on top.
data.flavor_text: "There's nowhere in Strixhaven I can't find. Where do you need to go?"

data.name: Cemetery Recruitment
data.oracle_text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand. If it's a Zombie card, draw a card.
data.flavor_text: To a necromancer as powerful as Liliana Vess, a graveyard is as good as a garrison of soldiers awaiting her command.

data.name: Cephalid Inkmage
data.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, surveil 3. (Look at the top three cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)
Threshold — This creature can't be blocked as long as there are seven or more cards in your graveyard.

data.name: Circuitous Route
data.oracle_text: Search your library for up to two basic land cards and/or Gate cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
data.flavor_text:
"The shortest path between two points is not always the safest."
—Tamina, district guide

data.name: Crash Through
data.oracle_text:
Creatures you control gain trample until end of turn. (Each of those creatures can deal excess combat damage to the player or planeswalker it's attacking.)
Draw a card.
data.flavor_text:
"We have to get out of the city, Djeru. All of us! Gather as many as you can."
—Samut, former Tah-crop initiate

data.name: Darksteel Colossus
data.oracle_text:
Trample (This creature can deal excess combat damage to the player or planeswalker it's attacking.)
Indestructible (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy this creature.)
If Darksteel Colossus would be put into a graveyard from anywhere, reveal Darksteel Colossus and shuffle it into its owner's library instead.

data.name: Deadly Brew
data.oracle_text: Each player sacrifices a creature or planeswalker of their choice. If you sacrificed a permanent this way, you may return another permanent card from your graveyard to your hand.
data.flavor_text: No one ever asked what was in Dina's concoctions, so long as they worked.

data.name: Deadly Plot
data.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Destroy target creature or planeswalker.
• Return target Zombie creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.
data.flavor_text:
"Open grave available, only one previous tenant."
—Sign on cemetery gate

data.name: Demolition Field
data.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Destroy target nonbasic land an opponent controls. That land's controller may search their library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. You may search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

data.name: Driver of the Dead
data.oracle_text: When this creature dies, return target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.
data.flavor_text: Some vampires resorted to corpse trading after cathars burned their estates and drove them from their ancestral feeding grounds.

data.name: Elvish Regrower
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand.
data.flavor_text: "There you are, little friends! You've been sleeping for a long time, but it's time to wake up now."

data.name: Evolving Wilds
data.oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
data.flavor_text: The land is ever resilient. Should it die, it will be reborn.

data.name: Expedition Map
data.oracle_text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Search your library for a land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
data.flavor_text:
"I use maps to find out where explorers have already been. Then I go the other way."
—Javad Nasrin, Ondu relic hunter

data.name: Feldon's Cane
data.oracle_text: {T}, Exile this artifact: Shuffle your graveyard into your library.
data.flavor_text: Feldon bartered the second of these canes from a Yumok fisherman who had been using it as a boat tiller.

data.name: Fiendish Panda
data.oracle_text:
Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
When this creature dies, return another target non-Bear creature card with mana value less than or equal to this creature's power from your graveyard to the battlefield.

data.name: Fierce Empath
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, you may search your library for a creature card with mana value 6 or greater, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

data.name: Finale of Revelation
data.oracle_text:
Draw X cards. If X is 10 or more, instead shuffle your graveyard into your library, draw X cards, untap up to five lands, and you have no maximum hand size for the rest of the game.
Exile Finale of Revelation.
data.flavor_text: "Brother, your fate has always been bound to mine. Now we have reached the place where they shall both end."

data.name: Flamewake Phoenix
data.oracle_text:
Flying, haste
This creature attacks each combat if able.
Ferocious — At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you control a creature with power 4 or greater, you may pay {R}. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

data.name: Fleeting Distraction
data.oracle_text:
Target creature gets -1/-0 until end of turn.
Draw a card.
data.flavor_text: The first spell taught to young mages, it has spared the lives of many whose hands are too small to hold a sword.

data.name: Garruk's Uprising
data.oracle_text:
When this enchantment enters, if you control a creature with power 4 or greater, draw a card.
Creatures you control have trample. (Each of those creatures can deal excess combat damage to the player or planeswalker it's attacking.)
Whenever a creature you control with power 4 or greater enters, draw a card.

data.name: Gate Colossus
data.oracle_text:
Affinity for Gates (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Gate you control.)
This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.
Whenever a Gate you control enters, you may put this card from your graveyard on top of your library.

data.name: Grow from the Ashes
data.oracle_text:
Kicker {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell.)
Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. If this spell was kicked, instead search your library for two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

data.name: Helpful Hunter
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, draw a card.
data.flavor_text:
"Ah, the conquering hero returns! What trials did you face, little one?"
—Basri Ket

data.name: Hoarding Dragon
data.oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, you may search your library for an artifact card, exile it, then shuffle.
When this creature dies, you may put the exiled card into its owner's hand.

data.name: Inspiration from Beyond
data.oracle_text:
Mill three cards, then return an instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand.
Flashback {5}{U}{U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)
data.flavor_text: When seeking spiritual enlightenment, best to go directly to the source.

data.name: Inspiring Overseer
data.oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, you gain 1 life and draw a card.
data.flavor_text: The angels were determined to show a city run by demons that there was a better path.

data.name: Into the Roil
data.oracle_text:
Kicker {1}{U} (You may pay an additional {1}{U} as you cast this spell.)
Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. If this spell was kicked, draw a card.
data.flavor_text: In theory, the death of the Eldrazi should have stilled the Roil. It did not.

data.name: Lightshell Duo
data.oracle_text:
Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)
When this creature enters, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

data.name: Macabre Waltz
data.oracle_text: Return up to two target creature cards from your graveyard to your hand, then discard a card.
data.flavor_text: Liliana is never one to follow someone else's lead.

data.name: Maze's End
data.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add {C}.
{3}, {T}, Return this land to its owner's hand: Search your library for a Gate card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. If you control ten or more Gates with different names, you win the game.

data.name: Micromancer
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, you may search your library for an instant or sorcery card with mana value 1, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
data.flavor_text: "Ideas don't have to be big to be great."

data.name: Muldrotha, the Gravetide
data.oracle_text: During each of your turns, you may play a land and cast a permanent spell of each permanent type from your graveyard. (If a card has multiple permanent types, choose one as you play it.)
data.flavor_text:
"My child grew from rot and ruin, yet she bloomed."
—Multani

data.name: Mystical Teachings
data.oracle_text:
Search your library for an instant card or a card with flash, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
Flashback {5}{B} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

data.name: Nullpriest of Oblivion
data.oracle_text:
Kicker {3}{B} (You may pay an additional {3}{B} as you cast this spell.)
Lifelink
Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)
When this creature enters, if it was kicked, return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

data.name: Opt
data.oracle_text:
Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)
Draw a card.
data.flavor_text: Teferi had once wielded the power—-and hubris—of a god. To fix his mistakes, he would risk everything.

data.name: Ordeal of Nylea
data.oracle_text:
Enchant creature
Whenever enchanted creature attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on it. Then if it has three or more +1/+1 counters on it, sacrifice this Aura.
When you sacrifice this Aura, search your library for up to two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

data.name: Progenitus
data.oracle_text:
Protection from everything
If Progenitus would be put into a graveyard from anywhere, reveal Progenitus and shuffle it into its owner's library instead.
data.flavor_text: The Soul of the World has returned.

data.name: Quilled Greatwurm
data.oracle_text:
Trample
Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage during your turn, put that many +1/+1 counters on it. (It must survive to get the counters.)
You may cast this card from your graveyard by removing six counters from among creatures you control in addition to paying its other costs.

data.name: Raise the Past
data.oracle_text: Return all creature cards with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.
data.flavor_text: At Strixhaven University, learning about the past means talking to those who were there.

data.name: Reassembling Skeleton
data.oracle_text: {1}{B}: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.
data.flavor_text:
"If none of the bones are original, is it even the same skele—aaagh!"
—Mort the Philosopher, last words

data.name: Rise of the Dark Realms
data.oracle_text: Put all creature cards from all graveyards onto the battlefield under your control.
data.flavor_text:
"For every living person there are generations of dead. Which realm would you rather rule?"
—Liliana Vess

data.name: Rune-Scarred Demon
data.oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, search your library for a card, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
data.flavor_text: The litany of the infernal on his flesh pulses to the beating of his dark heart.

data.name: Rune-Sealed Wall
data.oracle_text:
Defender
{T}: Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)
data.flavor_text:
"If the giant, repelling wards aren't enough to keep out nosy visitors, the huge wall should help."
—Kastigan, reclusive runecaster

data.name: Sanguine Indulgence
data.oracle_text:
This spell costs {3} less to cast if you've gained 3 or more life this turn.
Return up to two target creature cards from your graveyard to your hand.
data.flavor_text:
"Drink from the vein? How provincial."
—Lord Duchorvin

data.name: Shipwreck Dowser
data.oracle_text:
Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)
When this creature enters, return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand.
data.flavor_text: Lost at sea doesn't have to mean lost forever.

data.name: Skyship Buccaneer
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Raid — When this creature enters, if you attacked this turn, draw a card.
data.flavor_text:
"It's a pirate's nature to be free of law. Gravity is no exception."
—Kari Zev, skyship captain

data.name: Solemn Simulacrum
data.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
When this creature dies, you may draw a card.

data.name: Sphinx of Forgotten Lore
data.oracle_text:
Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.)
Flying
Whenever this creature attacks, target instant or sorcery card in your graveyard gains flashback until end of turn. The flashback cost is equal to that card's mana cost. (You may cast that card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

data.name: Springbloom Druid
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, you may sacrifice a land. If you do, search your library for up to two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
data.flavor_text: "New growth applies a healing poultice to wounds long scabbed over."

data.name: Storm Fleet Spy
data.oracle_text: Raid — When this creature enters, if you attacked this turn, draw a card.
data.flavor_text: "They're searching in the same direction we are. And for the same thing, I'll wager."

data.name: Sun-Blessed Healer
data.oracle_text:
Kicker {1}{W} (You may pay an additional {1}{W} as you cast this spell.)
Lifelink (Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.)
When this creature enters, if it was kicked, return target nonland permanent card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

data.name: Think Twice
data.oracle_text:
Draw a card.
Flashback {2}{U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)
data.flavor_text: "Either I know just the spell I need, or I'm about to."

data.name: Uncharted Voyage
data.oracle_text:
Target creature's owner puts it on their choice of the top or bottom of their library.
Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)
data.flavor_text: As his ship passed the waterlogged wrecks, Markos realized he wasn't the first person to try sailing out of the Underworld.

data.name: Vampire Soulcaller
data.oracle_text:
Flying
This creature can't block.
When this creature enters, return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.
data.flavor_text: "Don't worry, little friends. We will not be hungry much longer."

data.name: Vanguard Seraph
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever you gain life for the first time each turn, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)
data.flavor_text: She guides expedition parties through the perilous floating ruins of Zendikar's ancient empires.

data.name: Vile Entomber
data.oracle_text:
Deathtouch (Any amount of damage this deals to a creature is enough to destroy it.)
When this creature enters, search your library for a card, put that card into your graveyard, then shuffle.
data.flavor_text: The dead are lonely in the crypt and always eager for company.

data.name: Wary Thespian
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters or dies, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)
data.flavor_text: Giorgio paced the stage anxiously. This was their final rehearsal, but there were still so many mistakes!

data.name: Wishclaw Talisman
data.oracle_text:
This artifact enters with three wish counters on it.
{1}, {T}, Remove a wish counter from this artifact: Search your library for a card, put it into your hand, then shuffle. An opponent gains control of this artifact. Activate only during your turn.

data.name: Zombify
data.oracle_text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.
data.flavor_text:
"The first birth celebrates life. The second birth mocks it."
—Mystic elder

data.name: Zul Ashur, Lich Lord
data.oracle_text:
Ward—Pay 2 life. (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays 2 life.)
{T}: You may cast target Zombie creature card from your graveyard this turn.
